//: CommonJS main process (see apps/desktop/package.json `type: commonjs`). NodeNext resolves the module kind from the package.json `type` field, so .ts files here compile to CJS (the most launch/packaging-reliable Electron config; preload ESM has caveats per Electron's ESM docs and this env can't launch a GUI to verify them). OVERRIDE: `verbatimModuleSyntax` is set to `false` here as a scoped deviation from ADR-0001's project-wide `true` — CJS files cannot contain ES import/export syntax under verbatimModuleSyntax, and we want to keep ES `import`/`import type` syntax for clarity. All other base settings (strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, NodeNext, skipLibCheck) are inherited unchanged. All imports from @bts-soundboard/shared are type-only and erased, so there is no runtime ESM/CJS interop concern.
